name: improve-app
description: Guided journey from a shipped app that is getting more expensive to change to one that is stable, resilient, and polished where users feel it. Orchestrates eleven skills phase by phase - clean-code, refactoring-patterns, working-with-legacy-code, software-design-philosophy, release-it, ddia-systems, microinteractions, ux-heuristics, high-perf-browser, pragmatic-programmer, steve-jobs-design-review - asking the user questions at every decision point and recording results in the project docs/ fold
author: wondelai
